untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific topping patterns (Head & Shoulders, Double Top) and consolidation zone identification. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and range-bound detection logic that cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicator comparisons with the allowed operators (>, <, >=, <=, ==, crosses_above, crosses_below, is). The signal is fundamentally a pattern-avoidance rule rather than an indicator-based entry signal. Consolidation duration threshold and consolidation range boundaries cannot be computed from the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This is a RISK AVOIDANCE signal rather than a traditional entry signal. It instructs traders to AVOID consolidation zones following topping patterns. The rule cannot be translated into actionable entry conditions using available indicators. Only a partial exit condition (exit longs on technical breakdown) could be approximated. Full implementation requires custom pattern recognition logic outside the scope of indicator-based rules.
